name: HEALTHY EXTRACTS INC.
summary: Healthy Extracts Inc. (HYEX) is a platform for acquiring, developing, patenting, marketing, and distributing plant-based nutraceuticals. Operating through two subsidiaries, BergaMet NA LLC and Ultimate Brain Nutrients LLC, the company offers heart, immune, and brain health supplements. Key products include BergaMet PRO+ (citrus bergamot-based) and UBN brain health formulations. The company targets U.S. consumers and operates in the multibillion-dollar nutraceuticals market.

products.name: BergaMet PRO+
products.description: Citrus bergamot supplement with 47% BPF Gold potency targeting heart health, immune response, and metabolic syndrome.

products.name: BergaMet SuperFruit formulations
products.description: All-natural Citrus Bergamot SuperFruit-based nutraceutical products for heart and immune health.

products.name: UBN brain health formulations
products.description: Plant-based neuro-products developed over 20+ years targeting brain health, memory, cognition, and mental energy.

products.name: UBN RELIEF
products.description: Nutraceutical product targeting migraine sufferers, addressing a market of approximately 39 million U.S. sufferers.

products.name: Gel-pack delivery system
products.description: Ingestible gel technology delivery system for supplements, planned for launch in 2025 via Gelteq partnership.

partnerships.description: Exclusive U.S. and Canada licensing and manufacturing agreement for ingestible gel-pack supplement delivery technology, launching 2025.
